name: Postmates Delivery API
description: The Postmates API enables programmatic access to Postmates' on-demand delivery platform. It allows you to get delivery quotes, create deliveries, track delivery status, and manage deliveries (cancel or return). Note: Postmates was acquired by Uber in 2020 and the API has been deprecated in favor of Uber Direct (https://developer.uber.com/docs/deliveries). This spec documents the original Postmates API (v1) as it existed before deprecation.
